package rulefixtures

// scenario for map_of_slices_prealloc: `m[k] = append(m[k], v)` in loops without pre-allocating inner slices
// fixture polarity: positive; family: performance; severity: info.
type Rule617PositiveRecord struct {
	ID int
	Name string
	Values []string
}

func scenario617Positive(records []Rule617PositiveRecord) int {
	total := 0
	for _, record := range records {
		for _, value := range record.Values {
			total += len(value) + record.ID
		}
	}
	return total
}
